Name: insertFile
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::text AS "bucket_id", $3::text AS "name", $4::text AS "mime_type", $5::int4 AS "size", $6::text AS "etag", $7::bool AS "is_uploaded", $8::uuid AS "uploaded_by_user_id") AS data WHERE data."bucket_id" = ANY($9::text[])), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 1 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "storage"."files" ("id", "bucket_id", "name", "mime_type", "size", "etag", "is_uploaded", "uploaded_by_user_id") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."bucket_id", check_mutation_result."name", check_mutation_result."mime_type", check_mutation_result."size", check_mutation_result."etag", check_mutation_result."is_uploaded", check_mutation_result."uploaded_by_user_id" FROM check_mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."bucket_id" AS "bucketId", mutation_result."name" AS "name", mutation_result."uploaded_by_user_id" AS "uploadedByUserId") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result
